case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. JEFFREY CAPARRO et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, THE HOLLINS LAW'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 8, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 29, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F).JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Caroline McCormick, Esq. of the Law Offices of Caroline McCormick, T:925.628.4470, appearing specially for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentive ruling which was uncontested. Ronnie Chow, Esq. and Hollins Law's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Continued To Oct-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
THE HOLLINS LAW'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK is continued to October 8, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 29, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f).Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
